name: checking-changes
tagline: Runs `make check` (format, lint, type, unit tests) on uncommitted changes before ending a work session.
verdict: Small, single-purpose, safe skill with clear triggers, concrete steps, and naturally idempotent re-runs. No security concerns found. It doesn't declare or verify the `make` dependency, and carries no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Invokes `make check` without declaring or checking that `make` / the Makefile `check` target exist.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
